title: Jiu Tangshu: Old Book of Tang, Selection 3
description: From Jiu Tangshu: Old Book of Tang: chapter 3
introduction: From Jiu Tangshu: Old Book of Tang: chapter 3

translation.text: From Jiu Tangshu: Old Book of Tang: A foundational chapter of one of China's official Twenty-Four Histories, recording the deeds, institutions, and biographies of an entire dynasty.
